title: 🚨 it's here - black friday week - 70% off in the app marketplace

posts.author: garfield-labs (Snir Alon)
posts.cookedHtml:
HEY MONDAY.COM USERS—LISTEN UP!

You’ve been using the Same Item Multiple Boards app, and I know you love it. Here’s the deal—this Black Friday, we’re doing something INSANE:

70% OFF. FOREVER.

Screenshot 2024-11-21 at 20.51.191092×868 34.3 KB

Yeah, you heard me. You lock it in now, and you’re set for life. This isn’t some discount for the next year—it’s yours to keep. Forever.

But here’s the catch—it’s ONLY available until November 29th. If you don’t jump on this now, you’re going to regret it.

Here’s how to apply it:
Go to the monday.com App Marketplace.
Search for “Same Item Multiple Boards.”
Hit “See Plans” and check out.
Watch the discount pop up like magic.

It’s simple, it’s fast, and it’s going to save you a TON of money while making your team’s workflow smoother than ever.

This app was built for teams like yours who are tired of wasting time and duplicating effort. With this deal, you’re not just buying an app—you’re investing in speed, simplicity, and total control.

So stop scrolling. Click the link. Upgrade NOW.

GET 70% OFF FOREVER—RIGHT NOW!
